_comment: Hot-function map for the PPCG backend, keyed by source basename. Values are the function(s) whose bodies get #pragma scop markers (Phase 0's per-program hot-kernel calls, SCOP_CLASSIFICATION.md). ppcg_to_cu.py consults this when --fn is not given; absent entries fall back to pet autodetect. Entries without a mode are bucket-A, verified to produce a compilable .cu. mode=hybrid marks bucket-B Phase 3 targets: only the listed affine sub-kernels are GPU-ified, and run_pipeline.py routes the result through the hybrid relay (PPCG partial + LLM glue-stitching) instead of treating it as a complete translation; an entry PPCG rejects just falls through to the plain LLM path, so hybrid entries are safe to list before GPU validation.

multigrid.c._why: recursive vcycle + per-level alloc stay host/LLM glue; residual() is affine too but its body ends in a return, which pet can't have inside a scop region

rgf.c._why: per-block BxB GEMMs are affine (B is a symbolic parameter); the sequential block sweep and the pivoted mat_inv stay host/LLM glue
